scenario:
INVITE sips:[field1]@[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sips:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sips:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]; Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sips:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TLS Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0
ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=TCP SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1519362456 2 IN IP4 10.133.67.25 s=- c=IN IP4 10.133.67.137 b=AS:64 t=0 0 m=audio 35064 RTP/AVP 0 109 c=IN IP4 10.133.67.137 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:109 telephone-event/8000 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 m=video 0 RTP/AVP 100 98 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:100 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000
BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] [last_Call-ID:] Contact: sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP CSeq: 3 BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
-->
